testcase.name: test_admin_login_returns_isAdmin_true

failure.message: AssertionError: Admin user should have isAdmin=True, got: None assert None == True + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf974c5f923c0>('isAdmin') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf974c5f923c0> = {'email': 'admin@gotoretreats.com', 'firstName': 'Admin', 'handle': 'adminuser', 'id': '699f257a647fefb4323fce45', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_api.py:40: in test_admin_login_returns_isAdmin_true assert user.get("isAdmin") == True, f"Admin user should have isAdmin=True, got: {user.get('isAdmin')}" E AssertionError: Admin user should have isAdmin=True, got: None E assert None == True E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf974c5f923c0>('isAdmin') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf974c5f923c0> = {'email': 'admin@gotoretreats.com', 'firstName': 'Admin', 'handle': 'adminuser', 'id': '699f257a647fefb4323fce45', ...}.get
